content.text: according to what's saved in your family's memory, mira made the switch from purees to finger foods at around 9 months old — that's the fact on record here, logged with good confidence from something you shared previously. mira is now 36 months, so she's been a finger-food eater for well over two years at this point. if you're trying to pin down a more specific date or are looking back for records purposes, your pediatric office (Riverdale Pediatrics) would have that in their notes from around that time.
